calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Oct-14-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Amanda Ebey appeared in person for and with Robert Klotovich (petitioner).

The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Lost Will Annexed. The lost will dated May 9, 2013 is admitted to probate. Robert Klotovich is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $489,000.00. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for April 19, 2027 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If either a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status on administration is filed two weeks prior to the hearing date, the status hearing will go off calendar. Shirly Yawitz is appointed Probate Referee.

The Court stated that Robert Klotvich provided information that overcame the presumption of Probate Code 6124.

Judge: Ross C. Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.
